extension.name: SAML Authentication
extension.description: SAML2-based Single Sign-On for CiviCRM Standalone. Supports Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and other SAML2 identity providers.

compatibility.comments: Semantic versioning. For example, compatibility with "6.1" implies compatibility with "6.2".

php_compatibility.comments: Listed versions. For example, specify both "8.1" and "8.2".

smarty_compatibility.comments: Listed versions. For example, specify both "4" and "5".

extension.comments: v2.0: env-driven configuration via CIVICRM_SAML_AUTH_* variables; SP metadata endpoint; RelayState allowlist; subscriber-pattern hooks. Emergency bypass key removed — set CIVICRM_SAML_AUTH_MODE=disabled and redeploy if you need to fall back to password login.
